detail.description: Bryce Teodosio flies out to right fielder Kyle Tucker.

Bryce Teodosio singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.

Bryce Teodosio singles on a ground ball to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Bryce Teodosio singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Tyler Heineman. Logan O'Hoppe to 2nd.
Bryce Teodosio grounds into a force out, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement. Logan O'Hoppe out at 2nd.

Bryce Teodosio singles on a ground ball to shortstop Mauricio Dubón. Logan O'Hoppe scores. Oswald Peraza to 3rd. Yoán Moncada to 2nd.
